title: Molson Coors OKs $2 billion buyback program, targets long-term sales growth in the low single digits
text: Molson Coors Beverage Co. TAP, -1.58% on Tuesday said its board had cleared a five-year, $2 billion stock buyback program and said it was “on track” to deliver its second straight year of sales and profit growth. The remarks were made in connection with the brewer's 2023 strategy day in New York.
